sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Object Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Players can pick up and throw objects (acorns, crates, barrels, balls) at enemies and bosses

special_mechanics.name: Co-op Partner Throw
special_mechanics.description: New feature allowing one player to pick up and throw the other player as a weapon

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical data. No physics parameter values are quantified in available sources. Game is described as having responsive controls but lacks detailed movement/physics documentation. Characterized as simple platforming suitable for beginners to intermediate players.
